titles.title: Akuyaku Reijou no Tsuihougo!: Kyoukai Kaikaku Gohan de Yuuyuu Sister-gurashi
The Banished Villainess! Living the Leisurely Life of a Nun Making Revolutionary Church Food
悪役令嬢の追放後! 教会改革ごはんで悠々シスター暮らし

data.title: Akuyaku Reijou no Tsuihougo!: Kyoukai Kaikaku Gohan de Yuuyuu Sister-gurashi
data.title_japanese: 悪役令嬢の追放後! 教会改革ごはんで悠々シスター暮らし
title_synonyms: The Banished Villainess! Living the Leisurely Life of a Nun Making Revolutionary Church Food
data.synopsis:
Reincarnated as the villainess, Elizabeth Fontini fought against her fate, but it was all for naught. Repeated misunderstandings compounded with unfortunate circumstances lead to her inevitable downfall, and Elizabeth is banished to the nunnery.

However, what most thought to be punishment is actually Elizabeth's long-awaited freedom! Life as a sister isn't too bad, but her short respite is muddled by the arrival of Leonid Guardhelm, the head knight of her former kingdom. Not even he can put a damper on the optimistic girl's mood. Utilizing her past life's experiences as an event planner, Elizabeth sets out to revolutionize culinary arts and bring a sweet flavor to everyone's lives, one home-cooked dish at a time.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Kaketa Tsuki no Mercedes: Kyuuketsuki no Kizoku ni Tensei shita kedo Suteraresou nanode Dungeon wo Seiha suru
Mercedes and the Waning Moon: The Dungeoneering Feats of a Discarded Vampire Aristocrat
欠けた月のメルセデス～吸血鬼の貴族に転生したけど捨てられそうなのでダンジョンを制覇する～

data.title: Kaketa Tsuki no Mercedes: Kyuuketsuki no Kizoku ni Tensei shita kedo Suteraresou nanode Dungeon wo Seiha suru
data.title_japanese: 欠けた月のメルセデス～吸血鬼の貴族に転生したけど捨てられそうなのでダンジョンを制覇する～
title_synonyms: Mercedes and the Waning Moon: The Dungeoneering Feats of a Discarded Vampire Aristocrat
data.synopsis:
Reincarnated as a vampire to a noble father and his shunned concubine, Mercedes Grunewald has always known that one day, her father will choose an heir that isn't her. But what will become of her family when that time comes? Her mother has no skills, their maid is old, and Mercedes is but a small child. How will they survive in the world on their own? Luckily, dungeon crawling is a job that anyone can do—even a child. To provide for her family, Mercedes begins training at the age of a kindergartener, and because she's from a nation of vampires, she fortunately has the potential to become strong. In her past life, she died unfulfilled, but that won't be her fate this time. In the dungeons, she's determined to find something that will make her moon full.

(Source: J-Novel Club)

titles.title: パリに咲くエトワール

data.title: Paris ni Saku Etoile
data.title_japanese: パリに咲くエトワール
data.synopsis:
In the early 1900s, two Japanese girls—Fujiko, who dreams of becoming a painter, and Chizuru, who is passionate about ballet—refuse to give up and reach for the stars (Etoile) even in difficult times. After meeting by chance in Yokohama, they reunite in Paris, where they strive to pursue their dreams together.

(Source: MAL News)

data.title: Gu Wei Nan Ting
data.synopsis:
The story follows college student Gao Ying, who, on his way to university, accidentally stumbles into the Great Qing Hotel in Nanting Village. There, he encounters a series of bizarre events and unexpectedly awakens the long-sealed Prince Zhennan, Yinting. He is then dragged into a century-spanning catastrophe involving mysterious forces like the Tai Sui and ancient Shamanic powers.

(Source: WeTV)
data.background: Adaptation of Mo Fei's (墨飞) Chinese webtoon of the same title.

data.title: Da Xia Shou Mu Ren
data.synopsis:
Ten years ago, after three consecutive days of blood moon, ghosts, gods, heterochromatic eyes, and strange tales arrived one after another. Mystery and enigma descended upon the human world. Terror and despair roamed the earth. As humans, should we kneel in submission, weep bitterly, or draw our swords? This is a new era, and this era—belongs to the extraordinary! Pushing open the door to the extraordinary, Su Bai encountered a new world…

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Yu Luo Zhu Leng's (雨落竹冷) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Guanglin Diqiu
data.synopsis:
Aliens mistake "animation" for military information. Agent "Xiguang" is ordered to sneak into the earth to investigate the truth about animation. He encounters the earth girl "Qingyan". The two form the most unreliable interstellar investigation team in history and embark on a bizarre, ridiculous and magical journey.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Xiao Xinyu's (肖新宇) manhua of the same title.
